utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as required:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical_health with plan name and €160/month, mental_health with plan name and €96/month, and also preventive_care and a total_health_cost. This is fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home_insurance €76/month and technology_protection €32/month (which serves as contents/electronics coverage) and total_property_cost. Costs present and details provided. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides comprehensive_travel with plan name and €88/month and total_travel_cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists multiple services and specifies included at no extra cost, plus total_additional_cost €0/month. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan lists monthly_cost, annual_cost, and additional savings metrics. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and include the required cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item named in the final coverage plan to the closest exact plan name present in the ground-truth ratings. For health physical: 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' exists with rating 10 (the added words 'Premium Plan - €160/month' are cost details not affecting the name). For mental health: 'EliteCare Premium Mental Health' best maps to 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under mental health with rating 10. Preventive care: 'Preventive Care Package' appears under health_enhancement_services with rating 8. For property, 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' exists with rating 10. 'Technology Protection' appears under property_enhancement_services with rating 10. For travel, 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' exists with rating 10. Additional services listed as free (premium support, coordinator, etc.) do not have corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings, so they are not mapped.
